evals.description: Triggers on request to design an outbound sequence
evals.prompt: Help me build a cold outbound email sequence for our SaaS product targeting VP of Engineering
A prospect just said our pricing is too high. How do I respond?
How do I use MEDDIC to qualify this enterprise deal?

evals.description: Can write a cold email following the correct structure
evals.prompt: Write a cold email to the Head of Sales at a fintech company. We sell sales intelligence software.

assertions.value: I hope this finds you well

evals.prompt: A prospect agreed to a call. Should I jump straight into a product demo?

evals.description: Can explain SPIN question framework for discovery
evals.prompt: What questions should I ask on a discovery call with a mid-market operations manager?

evals.description: Advises multi-threading when single-threaded deal at risk
evals.prompt: My champion just went dark and hasn't replied in 2 weeks. The deal was supposed to close this quarter.

evals.description: Can structure a demo narrative around buyer pain
evals.prompt: How should I structure a 30-minute demo for a prospect who said their biggest pain is manual reporting?

evals.description: Warns against discounting without getting something in return
evals.prompt: The prospect is asking for a 20% discount. Should I just give it to them to close the deal?

evals.description: Can score a deal using MEDDIC and identify gaps
evals.prompt: We've had two calls. I know their pain and have a champion, but I haven't met the economic buyer and don't know their decision process. How should I forecast this deal?

evals.description: Advises adding value in follow-up rather than just checking in
evals.prompt: The prospect hasn't replied in a week. Should I just send a quick 'just checking in' email?

evals.description: Does not trigger for marketing campaign strategy
evals.prompt: Help me design a Google Ads campaign to drive top-of-funnel awareness for our brand
